note: As-is baseline: today's launcher (cli/internal/launch) only spawns WHOLE-pipeline sessions (/gogo:go, /gogo:done). One claude session IS the orchestrator and re-reads the tree each fix round. No --session-id, no --resume, no per-phase decomposition. This is what the change extends.

diagrams.title: Today's launcher: BuildIntent → Launch → one whole-pipeline claude session
